title: Snake Bite First Aid
content: Keep the person calm. Immobilize the limb. Do not suck venom. Seek medical help immediately.

title: Burn Treatment
content: Cool the burn under running water for 10 minutes. Do not apply ice. Cover with a clean cloth.

title: CPR
content: Push hard and fast in the center of the chest at 100 to 120 compressions per minute.

title: Bleeding Control
content: Apply direct pressure to the wound. Use a clean cloth. Elevate the injured area if possible.

title: Fracture Handling
content: Immobilize the injured area. Do not move the limb unnecessarily. Seek medical help.

title: Heat Stroke
content: Move the person to shade. Cool the body with water. Give fluids if conscious.

title: Choking First Aid
content: Perform abdominal thrusts. Encourage coughing if possible. Call for help if severe.

title: Electric Shock
content: Turn off power source first. Do not touch directly. Check breathing and call emergency services.

title: Drowning Response
content: Remove from water safely. Check breathing. Start CPR if needed.

title: Poison Ingestion
content: Do not induce vomiting. Rinse mouth. Seek medical help immediately.

title: Finding Water
content: Look for streams, collect rainwater, or use cloth to gather dew early morning.

title: Making Fire
content: Use dry wood and spark tools. Keep fire small and controlled.

title: Building Shelter
content: Use branches and leaves to create a cover. Stay dry and protected from wind.

title: Finding Food
content: Look for fruits, nuts, and edible plants. Avoid unknown or toxic items.

title: Staying Warm
content: Layer clothing. Stay dry. Use fire or insulation from ground.

title: Signaling for Help
content: Use smoke, mirrors, or loud sounds. Stay visible in open areas.

title: Avoiding Wild Animals
content: Do not approach animals. Make noise to avoid surprising them. Keep distance.

title: Navigation Without Tools
content: Use the sun's position. It rises in the east and sets in the west.

title: Using a Compass
content: Hold compass flat. The needle points to north. Align with map direction.

title: Finding North at Night
content: Locate the North Star. It indicates true north direction.
